From: CRO, Fernhollow Software (workflow tools, SMB + enterprise tiers)
To: BI

We're building the case for doubling down on enterprise. Everyone here already
agrees enterprise is where our growth is — the deals are bigger and the logos look
great. What should we be looking at in the data to support the enterprise push?
Board wants the proposal next month, so we have time to do this properly.

--- data landscape (from the platform team, 2026-06-07) ---
- CRM: deals won/lost with segment (SMB/enterprise), amount, discount %, sales rep,
  close date, back to 2023.
- Billing: subscriptions with segment, MRR, start/end dates, upgrades/downgrades.
- Support desk: tickets with account, segment, severity, hours-to-resolve.
- Product telemetry: weekly active seats per account since 2025-01.
- Onboarding tracker: implementation start/finish dates per account.
--- end ---

Whatever analysis ideas you have to make the enterprise case land, send them over.
